bird.name: Jelski's chat-tyrant
bird.summary: Jelski's chat-tyrant (Silvicultrix jelskii) is a species of passerine bird in the family Tyrannidae, the tyrant flycatchers. It is found in…

locations.name: 次生林
locations.summary: 次生林，又名天然次生林、再生林、再生森林、二次林。是指原始穩定的森林植被遭到人類活動干擾（刀耕火種、林木砍伐）或同等破壞性的自然現象之後，主要透過自然過程再生形成的森林或林地區域。其特徵有別於未曾遭受近期干擾的原始森林、複雜的早期遷移階段…

relations.subject: Jelski's chat-tyrant
relations.evidence: It inhabits the understory and edges of montane forest and secondary woodland, and also shrubby areas along nearby watercourses

relations.subject: Jelski's chat-tyrant

relations.object_summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。
